name: Tri-Grain Bread
recipeInstructions: Place the ingredients in the bread machine pan according to your machine's instructions. For Panasonic/National machines, use 3 1/2 teaspoons yeast. DAK/Welbilt machines require 2 extra tablespoons water for a 1 1/2 lb loaf. Using quick-rise yeast is an option. The original recipe calls for butter, which can be replaced with applesauce. This recipe yields one and a half pound loaf with approximately 1553 total calories when applesauce is used.
